problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
